_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Produce timely, fused, all-source cyber operations intelligence and/or indications and warnings intelligence products (e.g., threat assessments, briefings, intelligence studies, country studies).
reference_document_element_description: Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance threshold definitions, drift detection protocols, incident reporting procedures, and remediation timelines.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-004 (RM, cosine: 0.527), SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.295). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [assessments, briefings, country, cyber, fused, indications] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.835 (P=0.823, R=0.848). R exceeds P by 0.025 — the WIDAI KSA's 18 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 21 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Produce timely, fused, all-source cyber operations intelligence and/or indicatio" and "Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance thresho". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.593 > STS 0.295 (gap +0.298). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [assessments, briefings, country, cyber, fused, indications]. WIDAI terms: [ai, definitions, deployment, detection, drift, establish].
